retry_reason: Put operation releases a reference; retrying would cause double-free and undefined behavior.
contract_summary: This function releases the firmware buffer owned by the AMDGPU device. It calls amdgpu_bo_free_kernel which decrements the reference count on the underlying buffer object and may free it if the count reaches zero. After this call, the firmware buffer must not be accessed. The caller must ensure no other references exist; the function is a standard put wrapper and is not retryable.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to release the firmware buffer via amdgpu_bo_free_kernel, a put operation on the buffer object. No other logic exists.
